reviews.comment:
Quise pagar con tarjeta Máster y el posnet rechazaba la operación, al pedir que llamarán a la tarjeta para pedir autorización vía telefónica me dicen primero que a ellos no les corresponde hacer eso, .....al reiterarles que pidieran autorización porque es lo que corresponde me dicen que no porque lleva mucho tiempo.....tuve que pagar con otra tarjeta la cual no uso para combustible.  No tienen ganas de trabajar  día 01/02/2020 a las 13:28 !!!
Directamente si no quieren trabajar cobren en efectivo....
Enviare queja  a ACA casa Central y a Mastercard.

(Translated by Google)
I tried to pay with my Mastercard, but the POS terminal rejected the transaction. When I asked them to call the card issuer for authorization over the phone, they first told me it wasn't their responsibility to do that. When I reiterated that they should request authorization because that's what they should do, they said no, because it takes too long. I had to pay with another card, one I don't use for fuel. They clearly don't want to work. (February 1, 2020, at 1:28 PM)
If they don't want to work, they should just accept cash. I will be filing a complaint with ACA's main office and with Mastercard.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3918729990868918457/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzOW91dS1nRRAB
